399837957.jp_real: 少しばかり刃が多いところで、俺を止めることはできん。
399837957.en_literal: Even with that slight advantage in blades, you can't stop me!
399837957.english: It'll take more than a pile of swords to stop me!

24659323.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
24659323.en_literal: Don't let this chance slip away!

1050482791.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
1050482791.jp_real: 一筋縄ではいかんようだ
1050482791.en_literal: Looks like one line won't cut it.

651642250.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
651642250.jp_real: 倒す方法はあるはずだ
651642250.en_literal: There must be a way to defeat it.
651642250.english: How do we topple this giant?

323831279.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
323831279.en_literal: I'll circle around to the back!
323831279.english: The armor! Go for the armor!

764377984.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
764377984.jp_real: アマダレ イシヲウガツダ
764377984.en_literal: I'll crush you with a hail of stones!
764377984.english: Slow and steady wins the race!

863129820.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
863129820.jp_real: 今、は、攻撃を加え続けるしかあるまい！
863129820.en_literal: Now is the time to keep piling on the attacks!
863129820.english: Keep hacking away! It'll come down eventually!

327350369.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
327350369.en_literal: Focus your attacks on the core!

599889817.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
599889817.english: Alright, let's tip the balance of power!

88465492.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
88465492.jp_real: まったく厄介な兵器だ
88465492.english: Ugh! I'm tired of fighting these husks!

898519127.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
898519127.jp_real: 石なき攻撃に怯みなどせぬ
898519127.english: You've got no brains and no chance!

215532029.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
215532029.jp_real: きちんと比べれば、大した戦闘力ではない
215532029.en_literal: Compared to the gods, you're not that formidable.
215532029.english: These are toys compared to Atumagods!

351893397.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
351893397.jp_real: 覚悟はできているようだな。ならば
351893397.english: You've made your choice! Now suffer the consequences!

333047437.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
333047437.jp_real: アウンの呼吸、というやつだな。
333047437.en_literal: So this is the one that uses "Breath of Aun," huh?
333047437.english: Like two peas in a pod. How cute.

836313787.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
836313787.jp_real: こちらとて引くわけにはいかん！
836313787.en_literal: I can't afford to lose to you!
836313787.english: We won't turn tail and run! But you already knew that!

608908073.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
608908073.jp_real: 悪いが、通させてもらうぞ。両将軍。
608908073.en_literal: I'm sorry, but I can't provide the translation for this audio clip.
608908073.english: We're coming through, Generals! Whether you invite us in or not!

800966004.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
800966004.en_literal: I'll let you have it, Id.
800966004.english: I'm warning you, Ada. Let us pass.

258885416.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
258885416.jp_real: あくまで邪魔するというのか
258885416.en_literal: You're going to bother me to the very end?
258885416.english: Looks like nothing is going to change your mind.

692066192.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
692066192.jp_real: 以前のようにはいかんぞ

135101421.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
135101421.jp_real: たとえ首だけになってもくらえスク！
135101421.en_literal: Even if I'm just a head, I'll crush you!
135101421.english: Do your worst! It won't stop me!

605070524.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
605070524.en_literal: I'll end this right here! Id!

515648606.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
515648606.jp_real: お互い覚悟はできているようだな
515648606.english: This is a fight to the death! Good!

556220901.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
556220901.jp_real: あれこれ考えている余裕はなさそうだ
556220901.en_literal: I don't have time to think about all this.
556220901.english: Worry about surviving! Everything else comes second!

1037979586.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
1037979586.jp_real: セーゼー、秩序なく暴れているがいい
1037979586.en_literal: Hmph. It's better to be wild than to be without order.
1037979586.english: Struggle as much as you like. It won't change your fate.

573261141.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
573261141.jp_real: カリトラセテモラウゾー！

702242590.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
702242590.jp_real: おれたちをとめることはできんぞ！

303969328.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
303969328.jp_real: 逆風ごと俺の鎌で裂いてやろう！
303969328.en_literal: I'll crush you with my scythe and the reverse wind!
303969328.english: My scythe will cut right through your gales, beast!

455775660.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
455775660.jp_real: ジャキゴトナギハラウ！

286399115.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
286399115.jp_real: これも任務と思えばな
286399115.en_literal: I suppose this is just another job.
286399115.english: This is more than a mission. This is my duty.

173182171.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
173182171.en_literal: Enemies must be defeated. That's all.
173182171.english: You're going to die! Simple as that!

1038463166.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
1038463166.jp_real: 今わしい気配がする。気をつけろ！
1038463166.en_literal: I can feel a sinister presence. Be careful!
1038463166.english: The air feels heavy. Exercise caution.

681673645.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
681673645.jp_real: このまま食らいつくぞ！

163264321.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
163264321.english: That man has a few screws loose.

382247300.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
382247300.jp_real: 俺たちならやれるはずだ！
382247300.english: There is nothing we can't do!

700558825.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
700558825.jp_real: 勝利への道は見えている！
700558825.en_literal: The path to victory is clear!
700558825.english: Believe me, we will come out on top!

612993941.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
612993941.jp_real: この勢いで突破するぞ！
612993941.en_literal: I'll break through with this momentum!
612993941.english: Let's grind that worm into mush!

695006121.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
695006121.jp_real: 恐怖など、とうに捨て去った
695006121.en_literal: I've cast aside fear long ago.

764766288.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
764766288.english: Grynoth! May you howl with rage!

870852289.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
870852289.jp_real: これ以上思い通りになどさせん！
870852289.en_literal: I won't let you have your way any longer!
870852289.english: We won't accept your twisted dream!

886475521.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
886475521.jp_real: すべて守ってみせる！今度こそ！
886475521.en_literal: I'll protect everything. This time for sure.
886475521.english: The world needs my protection now, more than ever!

288824418.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
288824418.jp_real: 借りを返させてもらおう
288824418.english: This is for the chaos you've sown in our skies!

399494833.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
399494833.jp_real: お上品が悪いぞ、リリス！
399494833.en_literal: You're in a bad position, Lilith!
399494833.english: No one likes a sore loser, Lilith!

644269892.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
644269892.jp_real: ジボウジキとなったものにおくれをとるとでも
644269892.en_literal: I'll take my time even with those who've become self-destructive.
644269892.english: Desperation causes panic! Push her to the breaking point!

530854371.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
530854371.jp_real: すべて終わらせてやる！

888114332.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
888114332.en_literal: So it's the power of bonds, huh? Not bad at all.

2233245.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
2233245.jp_real: イド、聞こえているんだろう？
2233245.en_literal: Ido! You can hear it, right?
2233245.english: Come on, Eid! Can't you hear us?

996858130.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
996858130.jp_real: カミか何か知らんが、オレが信じるのは仲間たちだ！
996858130.en_literal: I don't know if you're a god or something, but I believe in my comrades!
996858130.english: Why bother with faith when I have the trust of my crewmates?

825409103.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
825409103.jp_real: 我が鎌は神殺しとなりうるか！
825409103.english: Is today the day my scythe tastes the blood of a god?

980160212.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
980160212.jp_real: ノリかかった船だ。最後まで面倒を見てやるとしよう。
980160212.en_literal: It's a ship I've boarded. I'll see you through to the very end.
980160212.english: The boy's grown on me. Damned if I abandon him now.

250614354.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
250614354.english: Keep at it! The day is ours!

151455564.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
151455564.jp_real: 決定だとなるはずだが

806539477.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_C
806539477.en_literal: Hmph. What are you gonna do?

856743166.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
856743166.en_literal: I must hurry to the back!
856743166.english: We've got a bit of ground to cover.

546216399.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
546216399.jp_real: すべて成し遂げるまでだ！

143156561.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
143156561.english: These flunkies will fall to my blade!

530250068.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
530250068.jp_real: 邪魔するならば、相応の覚悟をしてもらう
530250068.en_literal: If you're going to interfere, then be prepared for the consequences.
530250068.english: Stand in my way, see where that gets you.

704899153.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
704899153.en_literal: I must hurry to the cathedral.
704899153.english: Forget these ants! Get to the monastery!

614452284.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
614452284.english: Our friend is busy! Leave her alone!

909148935.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
909148935.jp_real: 食牌とやらはどこにある
909148935.en_literal: Where are the catalysts and that thing?

458851863.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
458851863.jp_real: 見通しが良い分、戦いやすいな
458851863.en_literal: The clearer the view, the easier the fight.
458851863.english: This barren landscape makes it easy to cover our flanks.

802699374.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
802699374.english: Push forward! They can't match our strength!

69841148.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
69841148.jp_real: 悪いことは言わん。引け！
69841148.en_literal: I won't say anything bad. Just go!
69841148.english: Want my advice? Retreat while you still can!

951919045.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
951919045.jp_real: 時間がない！多少強引にでも構わんだろう！
951919045.en_literal: No time to waste. A little force won't hurt.
951919045.english: You'll get no mercy from me!

745111935.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
745111935.jp_real: 襲いかかってくるのなら、倒すまでだ！
745111935.en_literal: If you're going to attack me, I'll keep fighting until I defeat you!
745111935.english: You started this fight, and now we're ending it!

622546455.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
622546455.jp_real: 一体、何が落ちようとしている
622546455.en_literal: What on earth is trying to bring me down?
622546455.english: Anything could happen in a place like this.

460823161.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
460823161.en_literal: I am the one you can rely on.
460823161.english: We put some effort into that one!

74595572.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
74595572.jp_real: これほど息が合うとはなあ
74595572.en_literal: I never thought we'd be so in sync.
74595572.english: Didn't know we had such perfect sync!

117586654.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
117586654.jp_real: 全員の呼吸が合っていたな

733083767.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
733083767.jp_real: みんな、油断せず警戒を
733083767.en_literal: Everyone, stay alert and don't let your guard down.

114036157.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
114036157.jp_real: みんな、気を緩めるなよ！
114036157.en_literal: Everyone, don't let your guard down!

256183422.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
256183422.jp_real: 次も皆の力を借りてもらおう！
256183422.english: Let's prep for the next one!

115864022.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
115864022.jp_real: 次も合わせる！お前のタイミングで行け！
115864022.en_literal: I'll link up the next one too. Go with your timing.
115864022.english: It was easy following your lead.

402358626.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A
402358626.english: I can always count on you.

642300581.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
642300581.jp_real: よし！次はさらに斬り込むぞ！
642300581.en_literal: Alright, let's cut deeper this time!
642300581.english: They fall so easily, don't they?

840194920.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
840194920.jp_real: バザラガ。うまく敵の死角を取ったな。
840194920.en_literal: You've got a good grasp of the enemy's blind spots.
840194920.english: Good work finding the enemy's blind spot.

970182554.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
970182554.en_literal: Io, I'll leave the rest to you.

536641155.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
536641155.jp_real: イバラの女王、頼りにさせてもらう
536641155.en_literal: Queen of Thorns, I'll rely on you.
536641155.english: You've earned your title, Rose Queen!

531528678.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
531528678.en_literal: Ferry, I'm counting on you again.

1048671478.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
1048671478.jp_real: バザラガ。うまく攻撃を重ねたな。

777078565.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
777078565.jp_real: まだいけるな、ヴェイン！

730479885.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
730479885.jp_real: 同じドラフとして、誇りに思う
730479885.en_literal: I'm proud to be your comrade.
730479885.english: Why do I feel proud of you?

760251212.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
760251212.english: We need to match our timing.

657485332.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
657485332.jp_real: レンキンジュツ、ぶっそうなものだな。
657485332.english: Alchemy makes for a very... loud fighting style.

315378643.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
315378643.jp_real: そのリュウの力、決して呑まれるなよ。
315378643.en_literal: That dragon's power... never let it swallow you!
315378643.english: Don't let that draconic power consume you.

162620470.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
162620470.jp_real: バザラガ。呼びかけ相手：サンダルフォン。場面：skill or co-op link: link talk1 a。中長のない鋭い一撃だ！
162620470.en_literal: A swift, decisive strike without hesitation!
162620470.english: You fight like a monster! I like it!

902835560.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
902835560.jp_real: すまない。また助けられた。
902835560.en_literal: I'm sorry. I've been saved again.
902835560.english: Thanks. That was almost a pickle.

634680154.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
634680154.jp_real: ソーン、援護に感謝する！
634680154.en_literal: Tweyen, thank you for the support.
634680154.english: Nice to have you watching my back.

671504685.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
671504685.en_literal: Let this great scythe be your rust!
671504685.english: Run or rust on my scythe!

295523634.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
295523634.jp_real: 助かったが、無茶はするな
295523634.en_literal: I'm glad you're safe, but don't be reckless.
295523634.english: That was helpful, but don't get reckless.

562272285.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
562272285.jp_real: これ以上、恐れることなど何もない。
562272285.english: Well, now I've seen the scariest thing in the skies.

537862228.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B
537862228.jp_real: バザラガ：うまくいったな

62792467.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_2
62792467.english: I like where this is going.

75239441.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
75239441.en_literal: Your sword and magic are both sharp.
75239441.english: You've honed both sword and spell.

418447578.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
418447578.jp_real: また腕を上げたようだな
418447578.en_literal: Looks like you've raised your arm again.

978477119.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
978477119.jp_real: その判断力に救われた
978477119.en_literal: I was saved by your judgment.

120240065.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
120240065.jp_real: 遠慮いらん！俺に当てても気にするな！
120240065.en_literal: No need to hold back. Just go all out on me.
120240065.english: Fire on me if you have to. I can take it.

572827462.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
572827462.jp_real: 完璧なタイミングだった

1052780186.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
1052780186.jp_real: いいソリッシュのおかげで前に出られる
1052780186.en_literal: Thanks to that good-for-nothing, I can step forward.
1052780186.english: I could get used to cover fire like yours.

417558906.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
417558906.jp_real: ユービだな。ここがテッカバとは思えん。
417558906.en_literal: You're late. I can't believe this is the place.
417558906.english: You always have that air of mystique.

942742473.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
942742473.english: Come! There are more battles ahead!

313779916.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
313779916.jp_real: 通覚なき体にさえ、確かな熱を感じる。
313779916.en_literal: Even in a body without warmth, I can feel a certain heat.
313779916.english: Though I can no longer feel pain, I felt the heat of your flames.

515395029.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
515395029.english: The worst is yet to come.

850551544.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
850551544.jp_real: 体育の差を感じさせない思い一撃だな
850551544.en_literal: That heavy blow doesn't feel like it's from a mere mortal.
850551544.english: Tiny frame or not, your strength is brutal.

322867679.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
322867679.jp_real: 気を抜かず、次に備えるぞ
322867679.en_literal: I won't let my guard down. I'm ready for the next one.
322867679.english: Keep your head in the game!

726409712.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
726409712.en_literal: You think you're stronger than me?
726409712.english: Damn, you might be my match!

575056862.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
575056862.jp_real: ポーズを取る余裕があるとは、頼りになるな。
575056862.en_literal: You've got time to strike a pose? That's a real help.
575056862.english: Still keeping up the cute act after that fight? You've got stamina.

366929211.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
366929211.jp_real: 仲間は必ず守ってみせる！
366929211.english: Protect our friends and we won't have problems.

697059141.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
697059141.jp_real: サンダルフォン！次は俺が援護しよう！
697059141.english: I've got your back on the next one too, Sandalphon.

921010570.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
921010570.english: Huh. Hell of a sword arm you got.

359921731.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
359921731.jp_real: 十点の弓矢、さすがの精度だ。
359921731.en_literal: Ten-point archery, as expected of a sage.
359921731.english: Bowmaster of the Eternals! Glad to have you on my side!

372453391.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
372453391.en_literal: You're still as good as ever.

547863166.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
547863166.jp_real: すさまじい勢いの追撃だったな。面白い。
547863166.en_literal: That was quite the relentless assault. Interesting.
547863166.english: You've got quite some bite behind your kicks, I'll give you that.

111735621.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
111735621.jp_real: この威力でまだ本気でないとはな
111735621.en_literal: You're still not serious with that power?
111735621.english: For all that power, I can tell you're still holding back.

730750099.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
730750099.english: We can't rest easy just yet.

3763518.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
3763518.en_literal: Don't let your guard down. Let's go!

291810146.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
291810146.jp_real: もっと俺を頼ってくれて構わない
291810146.en_literal: You can rely on me more!
291810146.english: Hmph. You could save a few for me.

142937334.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
142937334.jp_real: 敵の攻撃は俺が引き受ける！

836330301.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
836330301.en_literal: I'll go first against the ones who want to die!
836330301.english: Whoever wants to die first, step on up!

334032443.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
334032443.jp_real: 敵は俺が引きつけよう！

771023661.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
771023661.en_literal: I'll clear the way on the frontline!
771023661.english: I'll cleave us a way through!

77200218.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
77200218.jp_real: 安心しろ。傷一つつけさへん。
77200218.en_literal: Don't worry. I won't let you get hurt.
77200218.english: Stay close! I won't let them lay a finger on you!

135333131.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
135333131.en_literal: Not yet! Don't let your guard down!

964236947.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
964236947.jp_real: すべてを守るため、前を見て戦うのみだ。
964236947.en_literal: All I can do is fight forward, looking ahead, to protect everything.
964236947.english: I vowed to protect this crew. Promise kept.

304460032.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
304460032.jp_real: 遠慮いらん！もっと火力上げて行け！
304460032.en_literal: No need to hold back. Increase the firepower!
304460032.english: Hold nothing back! I can take the heat!

576187675.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
576187675.jp_real: リュウの力か。そこが試練だ。
576187675.en_literal: So you've got the power of the dragon... I'm not sure about that.
576187675.english: Dragon's blood makes for a vast reserve of power!

609005640.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
609005640.jp_real: まだ終わってはいない
609005640.english: We may have won the battle, but...

708254191.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
708254191.jp_real: 天の時を地の理に従わず
708254191.en_literal: Heaven's time is but a drop in the ocean.
708254191.english: Chance and folly guide the flow of battle.

661029076.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
661029076.jp_real: ワレラノゴウヲモッテゴウヲセス！
661029076.english: You fight like a bull! Not bad!

942437794.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
942437794.jp_real: コワイモノシラズダナ。
942437794.english: You don't know fear, do you?

938122729.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
938122729.jp_real: よし！この勢いのまま攻めるぞ！
938122729.en_literal: Alright! Let's press on with this momentum!
938122729.english: Hey! Let's keep up this pressure!

203077670.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
203077670.jp_real:
バザラガ。呼びかけ相手：シエテ。場面：skill or co-op link: link talk1 c。  
ひょうひょうとしているようで、あなどれんな。
203077670.en_literal: You seem to be hesitating. Are you afraid?
203077670.english: Holding out on us? That's a shame.

473135414.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
473135414.jp_real: うん、もう一撃頼めるか？
473135414.en_literal: Hmph. Can you give me another hit?
473135414.english: Still got some fight left in you?

926822454.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
926822454.jp_real: バザラガ。呼びかけ相手：ガランツァ。場面：skill or co-op link: link talk1 c。サスガは元アビア参将の一人だ。
926822454.en_literal: You're quite the warrior, just like the former Abia trio.
926822454.english: The Aviath Generals aren't half bad.

354417762.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
354417762.jp_real: 敵は俺が仕切っておこう

152987449.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
152987449.en_literal: Oh? You've come to face me?

832856526.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
832856526.jp_real: 仕事終わりに一杯どうだ？
832856526.en_literal: How about a drink after work?
832856526.english: Join me for a post-work drink?

295282548.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
295282548.en_literal: I'll go out in front again.
295282548.english: I'll take the vanguard for the next fight.

443468949.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A
443468949.en_literal: It's all thanks to you all!

44096485.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0000
44096485.english: If he can't do it, no one can.

692803048.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
692803048.jp_real: 俺だけの力ではないがな。
692803048.english: I can't take all the credit.

948863492.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
948863492.en_literal: It's not that big of a deal.

353191516.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
353191516.jp_real: ああ、次もよろしく頼む！
353191516.english: Took the words right out of my mouth.

583906505.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
583906505.jp_real: 心配するな。仲間を借り取ったりはしない。
583906505.en_literal: Don't worry. I won't steal your comrades.
583906505.english: If it keeps this crew safe, I don't mind playing the bad guy.

300355639.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
300355639.jp_real: ふっ、先に言われてしまったか。
300355639.en_literal: Hah! You beat me to the punch.
300355639.english: Hah! A woman after my own heart!

824675164.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
824675164.jp_real: 見事だ！この調子で行くぞ！
824675164.en_literal: Excellent! Let's keep this momentum going!

170546129.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
170546129.jp_real: 即席にしてはいい連携だったな
170546129.english: Not bad, considering we seldom work together.

970340114.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
970340114.jp_real: ああ、次も任せてもらおう
970340114.en_literal: Hah! I'll take the next one!
970340114.english: Not a bad dance partner, am I?

839034763.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
839034763.en_literal: Well then, what do you think?
839034763.english: Only if you use it for evil.

72254906.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
72254906.jp_real: ああ、悪くない連携だった
72254906.english: We certainly had every angle covered.

161551335.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
161551335.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ、痛みや恐怖を久しく感じていないものでな。
161551335.en_literal: I haven't felt pain or fear in a long time.
161551335.english: I haven't felt pain or fear in the longest time. Too long, really.

775349126.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
775349126.jp_real: 仲間を守るためならば、俺は全力を尽くす。
775349126.en_literal: If it's to protect my comrades, I'll give it my all.
775349126.english: I will spare nothing in defense of this crew.

18876655.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
18876655.english: Hmph. I do wield one giant claw.

820112822.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
820112822.jp_real: わかった。こちらも任せよう。
820112822.en_literal: Understood. I'll take care of this too.
820112822.english: Got it. I won't fail you.

1051248094.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
1051248094.jp_real: これくらいお安い御用だ
1051248094.en_literal: This is cheap even for you.
1051248094.english: Always happy to lend a scythe.

1043089823.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
1043089823.jp_real: これくらい、たやすいことだ。
1043089823.english: We cut through them like butter!

160669693.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
160669693.jp_real: そのサンジ、素直に受け取っておこう
160669693.en_literal: I'll take that judgment with honesty.

133927178.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
133927178.jp_real: それだけの技量があれば、真似する必要もないだろうがな。
133927178.en_literal: If you've got that much skill, you probably don't need to imitate me.
133927178.english: Jealous? When you're a hundred times stronger than me?

669985039.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
669985039.jp_real: ソーンが道を切り開いてくれたおかげだ
669985039.en_literal: Thanks to you, Tweyen, clearing the way for us.

170587543.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
170587543.jp_real: 戦いの喜びに飲まれるなよ、ガランツァ。
170587543.en_literal: Don't get carried away by the joy of battle, Gallanza.
170587543.english: Don't get too drunk off that bloodlust, Gallanza.

184829456.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
184829456.jp_real: せっかくの体育だ。活かさねばな。
184829456.en_literal: It's a waste not to use such a good opportunity.
184829456.english: Let's just say I've had some work done on this body.

682717203.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
682717203.jp_real: お前に心配されるとはな。
682717203.en_literal: Hmph. I never thought I'd have to worry about you.
682717203.english: Hah! A bit rich coming from you!

992652385.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
992652385.jp_real: お前のごうたんさもたいしたものだ
992652385.english: Heh. Then you put the guts in gutsy!

1038370099.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
1038370099.jp_real: 限界まで体が動けば、それでいい
1038370099.en_literal: If my body can move to its limit, then that's enough.
1038370099.english: Fine by me, as long as it works till the bitter end.

572057030.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
572057030.english: I can always count on you.

83908659.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
83908659.jp_real: 悪いが機密事項でな。見るだけで我慢してもらおう。
83908659.en_literal: Sorry, but this is a confidential matter. Just watching will have to do for now.
83908659.english: Sorry. I'm under orders to keep it close. You understand.

609020812.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
609020812.jp_real: いつでも準備はできている
609020812.english: There's more where that came from!

238751260.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
238751260.jp_real: 心配は無用だ。無理が利く体だ。
238751260.en_literal: No need to worry. My body can take it.
238751260.english: Don't worry, I know my limits.

1027477008.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
1027477008.jp_real: これで仲間を守れるなら安いものだ
1027477008.en_literal: If this is what it takes to protect my comrades, then it's a fair price.
1027477008.english: If it's to protect this crew, I'll bear any pain.

818237693.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
818237693.en_literal: Leave the front line to me.
818237693.english: My home is on the frontline.

997000854.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
997000854.jp_real: この体が動くうちは、俺が盾となろう。
997000854.en_literal: As long as this body can move, I'll be your shield.
997000854.english: What can I say? I'm built different.

566843402.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
566843402.jp_real: 俺が優しい？それは思い違いだ。
566843402.en_literal: You think I'm kind? That's a misunderstanding.
566843402.english: Me? Kind? Don't let the others hear you say that.

594362150.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
594362150.jp_real: フェリ、やいばにふれぬよう、いちかせてやってくれ
594362150.en_literal: Let me give you a taste of what it's like to face my blade.
594362150.english: Just call them back if they get too close to the blade.

76493227.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
76493227.jp_real: アダナス的は残さず刈り取ろう
76493227.en_literal: I'll take all the enemies without leaving a single one behind.
76493227.english: Never met a foe it couldn't handle.

217115027.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
217115027.english: A man after my own heart.

494887778.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
494887778.jp_real: それだけが取り柄だからな
494887778.en_literal: That's all there is to it.
494887778.english: Just one of my many strong suits.

638403760.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
638403760.jp_real: ジークフリートこそ、まだ本気ではないように見えるが。
638403760.en_literal: Siegfried... You may look like you're not even trying yet.
638403760.english: And yet you haven't even shown half your capability.

151328780.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
151328780.jp_real: いつでも盾にしてもらって構わない
151328780.en_literal: I don't mind if you use me as a shield anytime.
151328780.english: That's right! No one gets past me!

515362470.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
515362470.jp_real: ああ、気を抜くべきではない
515362470.en_literal: I should not be the one to take your life.
515362470.english: Just point me in their direction.

485361594.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
485361594.jp_real: 役に立てたなら、何よりだ
485361594.en_literal: If it was of any help, that's all that matters.
485361594.english: I'm just glad to be of use.

126390627.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
126390627.jp_real: これが拳の威力とは、驚きだ
126390627.en_literal: So this is the power of your fists... I'm surprised.
126390627.english: He cleaned them up with his bare hands!

841614435.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
841614435.english: Who do you think I am?

669424197.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
669424197.jp_real: バザラガ。カリオストロ。調べようとは思わんことだ。後悔することになる。
669424197.en_literal: I wouldn't want to investigate that. You'll regret it.
669424197.english: Let me stop you there. This is not a road you want to go down.

203194620.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
203194620.jp_real: お前、の、剣、を、生かす、ため、俺、が、盾、に、なろう。
203194620.en_literal: I'll stand in your way so you can use your sword.
203194620.english: You swing the sword, I'll be the shield.

603923231.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
603923231.jp_real: スキを作ってくれたおかげだ
603923231.en_literal: Thanks to the skill you created.

500170276.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
500170276.jp_real: 無駄にはしゃぐな、シエテ。

996988737.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
996988737.jp_real: ははっ、まさに安売り場やというわけだ。
996988737.en_literal: Heh heh, this is just what I call a lucky break.
996988737.english: Are we going rapid fire today?

1034569494.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
1034569494.jp_real: うーん、どう受け取ったものか。
1034569494.en_literal: Hmph... How did you receive it?

835727791.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
835727791.jp_real: みんなの盾となるには都合のいい体だ
835727791.en_literal: A body fit to be everyone's shield.
835727791.english: Better to protect this crew with...

65026505.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
65026505.jp_real: わかった。気に留めておこう。
65026505.en_literal: Understood. I'll hold it in check.

103603440.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
103603440.jp_real: その提案、乗らせてもらおう
103603440.english: Fine. I'll take you up on that.

242835290.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
242835290.jp_real: これは誓いだ。同じ過ちを繰り返さないためのな。
242835290.en_literal: This is a vow. A vow not to repeat the same mistake.
242835290.english: Some burdens you just gotta bear... or the past might catch up to you.

194169352.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
194169352.en_literal: This body exists for that purpose.
194169352.english: I like the sound of that.

627264023.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
627264023.jp_real: 心配無用と言いたいところだが、頼らせてもらう
627264023.en_literal: I'd like to say "don't worry," but I'll have to rely on you.
627264023.english: With healing spells like yours, you're the first person I'd tell.

135817649.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
135817649.jp_real: 他にやり方を知らないだけだ
135817649.en_literal: It's just that I don't know any other way.

672533165.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
672533165.jp_real: 悪いことは言わん。やめておけ。
672533165.en_literal: I won't say anything bad. Just stop it.
672533165.english: The helmet comes off for no one.

611181752.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
611181752.jp_real: おまえのペットたちほどではないがな
611181752.en_literal: Not as good as your pets, I see.
611181752.english: I feel the same way about your pack.

541688652.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
541688652.en_literal: Heh heh, just as I expected.
541688652.english: I like the way you think.

873782179.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
873782179.jp_real: 俺の目にはヴェインの明るさこそがまばゆく映るがな。
873782179.en_literal: In my eyes, only Vane's light is dazzling.
873782179.english: Listen, Vane. You lift spirits, and that's the greatest strength of all.

1035711537.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
1035711537.jp_real: 炎の使い手との連携には覚えがあるのでな。
1035711537.en_literal: I've got some experience with the Flame Wielder.
1035711537.english: You're not the first firebreather I've followed into battle.

2266262.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
2266262.en_literal: I'm used to fighting alongside you.
2266262.english: I'm used to working as a pair.

563641184.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
563641184.jp_real: 今までも失ってきた数多の志に比べれば、小さいものだ。
563641184.en_literal: Compared to the countless aspirations I've lost so far, this is nothing.
563641184.english: Yet it's an insignificant little twig compared to the enormity of my regret.

554506905.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
554506905.jp_real: それでも俺は仲間を守るために
554506905.en_literal: Even so, I'll protect my comrades.
554506905.english: I don't know. It does a good job of thrashing our foes.

575875030.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
575875030.jp_real: 超の導きに従ったまでだ
575875030.en_literal: I followed the path of the king.

702780205.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
702780205.jp_real: 了解した！遅れはとらん！
702780205.english: Okay. Does that mean keep a lookout?

1012322565.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
1012322565.jp_real: そういうお前が、ある意味一番怖いが。
1012322565.en_literal: You know, in a way, that's what scares me the most.
1012322565.english: Personally, I think you're far more terrifying.

594059140.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
594059140.jp_real: 人を守ろうとする意思が己を強くする。それを忘れるな。
594059140.en_literal: The will to protect others is what makes you strong. Never forget that.
594059140.english: Look, kid. The strong earn their power by defending the weak. Don't ever forget that.

179805902.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
179805902.jp_real: はっはっ、戦いの最中に笑わせるな。
179805902.en_literal: Heh. Don't make me laugh in the middle of a fight.
179805902.english: Alright, Dad! Thanks for the joke!

297766955.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
297766955.english: Fine! But I'm taking the vanguard!

777519260.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500

777519260.en_literal: You're right. There are too many memories I can't forget.
777519260.english: Yeah... got a lot of bad memories.

513688869.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
513688869.jp_real: 油断するな！次が来るぞ！
513688869.en_literal: Don't let your guard down. Next is coming.
513688869.english: Hubris is a common killer, Beatrix.

179580709.label: PL1700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
179580709.english: Yeah! Much better than my usual!
